'''vagowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumocyte|pneumocyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumocyte|pneumocyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vagowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vægeweth|vægeweth]] || [[word:vægewej|vægewej]] || [[word:vægewesh|vægewesh]] || [[word:vægewe|vægewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vagogowoth|vagogowoth]] || [[word:vagogowoj|vagogowoj]] || [[word:vagogowosh|vagogowosh]] || [[word:vagogowo|vagogowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vagowoth|vagowoth]] || [[word:vagowoj|vagowoj]] || [[word:vagowosh|vagowosh]] || [[word:vagowo|vagowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vagofwoth|vagofwoth]] || [[word:vagofwoj|vagofwoj]] || [[word:vagofwosh|vagofwosh]] || [[word:vagofwof|vagofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vagowotho|vagowotho]] || [[word:vagowojo|vagowojo]] || [[word:vagowosho|vagowosho]] || [[word:vagowoko|vagowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vagowoth|vagowoth]] || [[word:vagowoj|vagowoj]] || [[word:vagowosh|vagowosh]] || [[word:vagowo|vagowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vagowothol|vagowothol]] || [[word:vagowojol|vagowojol]] || [[word:vagowoshol|vagowoshol]] || [[word:vagowokol|vagowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vagowothotho|vagowothotho]] || [[word:vagowojojo|vagowojojo]] || [[word:vagowoshosho|vagowoshosho]] || [[word:vagowoko|vagowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vagowothon|vagowothon]] || [[word:vagowojon|vagowojon]] || [[word:vagowoshon|vagowoshon]] || [[word:vagowokon|vagowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vagowothoro|vagowothoro]] || [[word:vagowojoro|vagowojoro]] || [[word:vagowoshoro|vagowoshoro]] || [[word:vagowokoro|vagowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
